profile_suggestion_actions_cli_args_inva.description: Profile suggestion actions schema validator received invalid CLI arguments.
profile_suggestion_actions_cli_args_inva.remediation: Review CLI flags, fix invalid or missing arguments, and rerun validator.

profile_suggestion_actions_file_not_foun.description: Required profile suggestion actions schema/example/helper file is missing.
profile_suggestion_actions_file_not_foun.remediation: Ensure schema/example/helper file paths exist and rerun validator.

profile_suggestion_actions_json_parse_er.description: Profile suggestion actions schema or example file cannot be parsed as JSON.
profile_suggestion_actions_json_parse_er.remediation: Fix JSON syntax/encoding issues and rerun validator.

profile_suggestion_actions_schema_invali.description: Profile suggestion actions schema definition is invalid.
profile_suggestion_actions_schema_invali.remediation: Fix schema constraints to satisfy JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 and rerun.

profile_suggestion_actions_example_valid.description: Profile suggestion actions example payload fails schema validation.
profile_suggestion_actions_example_valid.remediation: Update example action fields to satisfy schema and rerun validator.

profile_suggestion_actions_helper_contra.description: Helper-generated profile suggestion actions violate schema contract checks.
profile_suggestion_actions_helper_contra.remediation: Debug helper action generation, fix schema mismatches, and rerun validator.

profile_suggestion_actions_unexpected_er.description: Unexpected runtime error occurred while validating profile suggestion actions schema.
profile_suggestion_actions_unexpected_er.remediation: Inspect stack trace and validator logs, patch runtime defect, then rerun.

summary_contract_cli_args_invalid.description: Summary contract validator received invalid CLI arguments.
summary_contract_cli_args_invalid.remediation: Review CLI flags, fix invalid or missing arguments, and rerun validator.

summary_schema_cli_args_invalid.description: Summary schema validator received invalid CLI arguments.
summary_schema_cli_args_invalid.remediation: Review CLI flags, fix invalid or missing arguments, and rerun validator.

placeholder_markers_cli_args_invalid.description: Placeholder markers validator received invalid CLI arguments.
placeholder_markers_cli_args_invalid.remediation: Review CLI flags, fix invalid or missing arguments, and rerun validator.

alertmanager_route_consistency_cli_args_.description: Alertmanager route consistency validator received invalid CLI arguments.
alertmanager_route_consistency_cli_args_.remediation: Review CLI flags, fix invalid or missing arguments, and rerun the validator.

alertmanager_route_consistency_file_not_.description: Required alertmanager routing file is missing.
alertmanager_route_consistency_file_not_.remediation: Ensure the alertmanager route file path exists and is readable.

alertmanager_route_consistency_yaml_pars.description: Alertmanager routing YAML cannot be parsed.
alertmanager_route_consistency_yaml_pars.remediation: Fix YAML syntax and structure, then rerun the validator.

alertmanager_route_consistency_matcher_f.description: Alertmanager route matcher format is invalid.
alertmanager_route_consistency_matcher_f.remediation: Correct matcher syntax to valid key-operator-value format and rerun.

alertmanager_route_consistency_invalid_r.description: Alertmanager route regex matcher contains an invalid regular expression.
alertmanager_route_consistency_invalid_r.remediation: Fix the regex pattern to be compilable and rerun the validator.

alertmanager_route_consistency_rules_dir.description: Prometheus rule directory for alert extraction is invalid.
alertmanager_route_consistency_rules_dir.remediation: Point to an existing readable rules directory and rerun.

alertmanager_route_consistency_no_rule_f.description: No Prometheus rule files were found for route coverage checks.
alertmanager_route_consistency_no_rule_f.remediation: Add rule files with alert definitions or fix the rules directory path.

alertmanager_route_consistency_no_alerts.description: No alert definitions were extracted from rule files.
alertmanager_route_consistency_no_alerts.remediation: Add at least one alert rule or update selected files to include alert definitions.

alertmanager_route_consistency_no_explic.description: Alertmanager routing config has no explicit child routes for matching alerts.
alertmanager_route_consistency_no_explic.remediation: Add explicit routes for managed alerts and rerun coverage validation.

alertmanager_route_consistency_shadowed_.description: A later alertmanager route is shadowed by an earlier non-continue route.
alertmanager_route_consistency_shadowed_.remediation: Reorder routes or adjust matchers to remove shadowing.

alertmanager_route_consistency_unmatched.description: At least one alert rule is not covered by any explicit alertmanager route.
alertmanager_route_consistency_unmatched.remediation: Add or adjust route matchers so every alert matches exactly one explicit route.

alertmanager_route_consistency_ambiguous.description: At least one alert matches multiple explicit alertmanager routes.
alertmanager_route_consistency_ambiguous.remediation: Refine route matchers to ensure each alert maps to a single explicit route.

alertmanager_route_consistency_unexpecte.description: Unexpected runtime error occurred during alertmanager route consistency validation.
alertmanager_route_consistency_unexpecte.remediation: Inspect traceback and validator logs, fix runtime defect, then rerun.

notification_retry_runbook_cli_args_inva.description: Notification retry runbook validator received invalid CLI arguments.
notification_retry_runbook_cli_args_inva.remediation: Review CLI flags, fix invalid or missing arguments, and rerun the validator.

notification_retry_runbook_file_not_foun.description: Required notification retry runbook or alert rule file is missing.
notification_retry_runbook_file_not_foun.remediation: Ensure all configured runbook and rule file paths exist and are readable.

notification_retry_runbook_baseline_pars.description: Notification retry runbook or rule content cannot be parsed into baseline thresholds.
notification_retry_runbook_baseline_pars.remediation: Fix baseline text format to match expected alert and runbook templates, then rerun validator.

notification_retry_runbook_baseline_mism.description: Notification retry runbook baselines drift from configured alert rule thresholds.
notification_retry_runbook_baseline_mism.remediation: Align runbook and rule thresholds, update baselines consistently, and rerun validator.

notification_retry_runbook_unexpected_er.description: Unexpected runtime error occurred during notification retry runbook validation.
notification_retry_runbook_unexpected_er.remediation: Inspect traceback and validator logs, patch runtime defect, then rerun.

error_context_high_frequency_cli_args_in.description: High-frequency error context validator received invalid CLI arguments.
error_context_high_frequency_cli_args_in.remediation: Review CLI flags, fix invalid or missing arguments, and rerun validator.

error_context_high_frequency_json_parse_.description: Failed to parse high-frequency error context schema or samples JSON.
error_context_high_frequency_json_parse_.remediation: Fix JSON syntax/encoding in schema or samples file and rerun validator.

error_context_high_frequency_sample_sche.description: At least one high-frequency error context sample does not satisfy schema constraints.
error_context_high_frequency_sample_sche.remediation: Update sample fields to satisfy schema constraints and required properties, and rerun validator.

error_context_high_frequency_samples_fil.description: High-frequency error context samples file is missing.
error_context_high_frequency_samples_fil.remediation: Ensure the samples file path exists and is readable in the current environment, and rerun validator.

error_context_high_frequency_samples_pay.description: High-frequency error context samples payload is not a valid sample object list.
error_context_high_frequency_samples_pay.remediation: Update samples file to a list of JSON objects and rerun validator.

error_context_high_frequency_schema_file.description: High-frequency error context schema file is missing.
error_context_high_frequency_schema_file.remediation: Ensure the schema file path exists and is readable in the current environment, and rerun validator.

error_context_high_frequency_schema_inva.description: High-frequency error context schema definition is invalid.
error_context_high_frequency_schema_inva.remediation: Fix schema definition to satisfy JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 requirements and rerun validator.

error_context_high_frequency_unexpected_.description: Unexpected runtime error occurred during high-frequency error context validation.
error_context_high_frequency_unexpected_.remediation: Inspect traceback and validator logs, patch runtime defect, then rerun.
